caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT" and a gold chain, along with a black baseball cap and grey over-ear headphones, is seated in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a professional microphone. In the background, a white wall features a logo with a red and black "BOSS TALK 101" sign and the word "HUSTLE" repeated alongside gold stars. A smaller logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene, while another "BOSS TALK 101" logo appears on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, shifting his gaze and facial expression. He begins by looking toward the left, then slowly turns his head to look more directly toward the camera with a slight smile.
